     def forward(self, x, edge_index, edge_attr, batch):

+        num_graphs = int(batch.max().item()) + 1

+

+        # Encode features

         if self.encoding_type == 'linear':

             x = self.node_emb(x.float())

             e_indices = e_clamped + edge_offsets_t

-        vn_idx = torch.tensor([0], device=x.device)

-        vn = self.vn_emb(vn_idx).squeeze(0)

-        vn_per_graph = vn[batch]

-        x = x + vn_per_graph

+        # Initialize virtual node

+        vn_indices = torch.zeros(num_graphs, dtype=torch.long, device=x.device)

+        vn_feat = self.vn_emb(vn_indices)  # [G, H]

 

-        layer_outputs = [x]

         for i in range(self.num_layers):

-            x = self.convs[i](x, edge_index, edge_attr)

-            x = self.bns[i](x)

-            x = F.relu(x)

-            x = F.dropout(x, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)

+            # Message passing

+            h = self.convs[i](h, edge_index, edge_attr)

+            h = self.bns[i](h)

+            h = F.relu(h)

+            h = F.dropout(h, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)

 

-            graph_rep = global_mean_pool_manual(x, batch)

-            vn = vn + vn_update

-            x = x + vn_per_graph

+            # Virtual node update

+            vn_aggr = global_mean_pool_manual(h, batch, num_graphs)  # [G, H]

+            vn_feat = vn_feat + F.dropout(self.vn_mlp_list[i](vn_aggr), p=self.dropout, training=self.training)

 

-            layer_outputs.append(x)

+            # Add VN back to nodes

+            h = h + vn_feat[batch]  # [N, H]

         if self.use_jk:

-        graph_rep = global_mean_pool_manual(x, batch)

-        out = self.head(graph_rep)

-        out = torch.clamp(out, min=-30, max=30)

+        # Graph pooling

+        graph_h = global_mean_pool_manual(h, batch, num_graphs)  # [G, H]

+

+        # Prediction head

+        out = self.head(graph_h)  # [G, 128]

         return out

 class EMA:

     def update(self, model):

                 self.shadow[name] = self.decay * self.shadow[name] + (1 - self.decay) * param.data
